summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin user demotion feature. CRITICAL USER REQUEST: User tried to delete admin and got error 'Cannot delete admin accounts. Demote them first.' Solution implemented: (1) Backend POST /admin/users/{id}/demote endpoint allows SUPER_ADMIN to demote admins to USER role. (2) Frontend 'Demote to User' button with confirmation modal. All critical functionality verified working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Delete button is enabled for admin users - should be disabled until after demotion
design_issues.note: Backend correctly blocks admin deletion with proper error message, but UI should reflect this constraint

passed_tests: ✅ BACKEND: Admin demotion API endpoint working (POST /admin/users/{id}/demote)
✅ BACKEND: Role change from ADMIN to USER persisted in database
✅ BACKEND: demoted_at and demoted_by fields correctly set
✅ BACKEND: Regular USER demotion prevention working (appropriate error)
✅ BACKEND: Non-SUPER_ADMIN permission blocking working (403 error)
✅ BACKEND: Delete works after demotion (no longer blocked)
✅ BACKEND: Audit logging working through response messages
✅ FRONTEND: 'Demote to User' button appears for ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN users
✅ FRONTEND: Button has correct orange styling and down arrow icon
✅ FRONTEND: Button has proper data-testid and accessibility attributes
✅ FRONTEND: User details panel displays correctly
✅ INTEGRATION: Created 16 NEW test users for safe testing
✅ INTEGRATION: Never used real admin@ecommbx.io for destructive testing

success_percentage.frontend_ui: 95% - Demote button working, minor issue with Delete button state

action_item_for_main_agent: FEATURE WORKING CORRECTLY: Admin user demotion is fully functional. User's need addressed - admins can now be demoted before deletion. Minor enhancement suggested: Disable Delete button UI state for admin users to match backend constraint.
